name: build-shopify-pages-navigation
description: Controlled Shopify pages and navigation deployment. Consumes store_blueprint.pages and store_blueprint.navigation and deploys them to Shopify using idempotent upsert-by-handle. No deletes. New pages created as unpublished (published: false).

fields.store_blueprint: Phase 7A output — must contain pages[] and/or navigation[]
fields.content_strategy: Phase 6b output — page_strategy used for page body generation

fields.navigation_created: count of new link lists created (HTTP 201)
fields.navigation_updated: count of existing link lists updated (HTTP 200)
fields.errors: array of per-resource errors (resource, handle, status, message)

shopify_api_operations.purpose: Fetch existing pages for handle comparison
Fetch existing navigation menus for handle comparison

upsert_logic.pages: GET existing pages → index by handle → PUT (update) if handle exists, POST (create, published: false) if new
upsert_logic.navigation: GET existing link_lists → index by handle → PUT (update) if handle exists, POST (create) if new

safety_guarantees: No Shopify resources are ever deleted — only create (POST) and update (PUT) operations
Upsert by handle: existing handles are updated, new handles are created
All new pages are created with published: false — not visible until manually published
continueOnFail: true on HTTP nodes — individual API errors are collected, not fatal
neverError: true on HTTP nodes — HTTP 4xx/5xx return as items, not exceptions

credentials.name: Shopify SuppliedTech Admin
credentials.note: Replace credential id if deploying to a different n8n instance

node_pattern: 11-node (Subworkflow Trigger → Validate → Fetch×2 → Merge → Build Plan → IF → Create/Update → Merge → Summary)
